findings.jp: ア．a:公開 b:共通 / イ．a:公開 b:秘密 / ウ．a:秘密 b:公開 / エ．a:秘密 b:共通
findings.zh: ア．a:公钥 b:对称密钥 / イ．a:公钥 b:私钥 / ウ．a:私钥 b:公钥 / エ．a:私钥 b:对称密钥
findings.en: A. a: Public b: Common / B. a: Public b: Private / C. a: Private b: Public / D. a: Private b: Common
findings.issue: ZH choices retain raw kana 'ア／イ／ウ／エ' labels — inconsistent with the previous 3 questions on the same page (which use 甲/乙/丙/丁). EN side correct (A/B/C/D). Within-page choice-marker convention not unified.
findings.recommended_fix: Normalize zh labels for q::3 to either '甲/乙/丙/丁' (match page convention) or migrate whole page to 'A／B／C／D' (recommended — matches EN, removes both kana and classical-numeric mismatch).

findings.issue: ZH uses classical 甲乙丙丁; EN uses A/B/C/D. Cross-language label mismatch makes side-by-side study harder for trilingual learner. Not wrong, but unconventional vs IT-Passport ZH study-guide norm (A/B/C/D).
findings.recommended_fix: Standardize ZH labels to A／B／C／D matching EN (and matching p469-style intent).

findings.issue: Same as q0 — 甲乙丙丁 vs A/B/C/D cross-language inconsistency.
Same as q0/q1 — 甲乙丙丁 vs A/B/C/D cross-language inconsistency.
